assertions.assertion: Uses context.Caller to differentiate between token types
assertions.rationale: The Caller property and ProfileDataCallers constants are Duende-specific internal APIs not commonly known without documentation
The exact constant name is Duende-specific and would not be known without the skill

assertions.assertion: Emits a minimal claim set (e.g. just name) for identity tokens
assertions.rationale: The prompt asks for this, so even with a wrong approach, the intent would be expressed

assertions.assertion: Emits a richer claim set for access tokens, using AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
assertions.rationale: Without the skill, an LLM would not know about AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
